live_fixture_policy.capture_rule: Capture with scripts/sorftime_call.py, redact credentials and personal data, then record endpoint, domain, captured_at and SHA-256.

fixture_catalog.purpose: Golden attribute tagging and pivot replay fixture

evals.prompt: 帮我分析 B0CVM8TXHP，写飞书并验证回读，给出市场和财务两层判断。
expected_checks: Market Decision and Financial Decision are separate
missing cost triggers reverse finance instead of skipping finance
live Feishu write with readback verification
every numeric claim has a source or assumption label

evals.prompt: nail drill 这个品类值得做吗？控制在 25 积分以内。
expected_checks: three keyword dimensions or an explicit missing-data reason
API plan does not exceed 25
blank supply is not called blue ocean without demand evidence

evals.prompt: 产品初选表里待分析的先给我批量计划，不要开始写。
expected_checks: deduplicated analysis keys
item count and estimated API cost
parallelism no greater than configured maximum
no live write

evals.prompt: 用 fixture 分析这个未配置品类的属性结构。
expected_checks: dimension-draft.json is produced
requires_dimension_confirmation is true
draft dimensions are not used as final opportunity evidence

evals.prompt: 校验 fixture 报告是否满足正式交付标准。
expected_checks: all required sections are present
at least three Sorftime source types are cited
market and finance decisions are separated
no unresolved placeholder remains

evals.prompt: 使用确认版电子配件维度重放同一份 Top100 数据并生成透视 CSV。
expected_checks: all source ASINs appear exactly once
dimension values conform to the confirmed schema
explicit cents conversion produces stable prices
pivot CSV and validation JSON are generated
